title: Autonomous Driving News: Tesla Sues, BMW Bails
description:
Tesla is continuing to aggressively pursue autonomous driving while two competitors -- BMW and Mercedes -- have abandoned the quest.

The post Autonomous Driving News: Tesla Sues, BMW Bails appeared first on CleanTechnica.
